name: recruiter-cold-outreach
description: Standard cold outreach from a recruiter at an agency. Should produce a recruited_for relationship and a 'lead' stage signal.

input.subject: Senior Backend role @ Linear — interested?
input.bodyText:
Hi Lucas,

I'm Talia from Bridge Talent. We're partnered with Linear (the issue tracker) on a Senior Backend Engineer search. Saw your work on distributed systems and thought it might be a fit — they're remote-friendly within EU timezones, $180–220k base, ~0.1% equity.

If you're open to a 15-min intro chat next week, here's my calendar: https://cal.com/talia-bridge.

No pressure if not!
Talia

stageSignal.reason: Cold outreach about a role; no application submitted yet — pure lead state.

relationships.sourceQuote: We're partnered with Linear ... on a Senior Backend Engineer search.

expected.summary: Bridge Talent recruiter Talia is sourcing for a Senior Backend Engineer role at Linear and is asking for a 15-min intro call.
